questions.question: Explain the difference between Bitcoin Script and Ethereum's smart contract language. (3 marks)
expectedPoints: Bitcoin Script is non-Turing complete and stack-based
Ethereum's Solidity is Turing-complete and more general purpose

questions.question: Describe how a Hashed Timelock Contract (HTLC) enables cross-chain atomic swaps. (8 marks)
expectedPoints: Uses cryptographic hash and preimage mechanism
Time locks ensure funds can be recovered if swap fails
Enables trustless exchange between different blockchains
Step-by-step process of the swap protocol
Role of both parties in revealing the preimage
